name: AAA Gateway
description: Governed agent gateway for AAA. Exposes only approved delegation and coordination surfaces.

security_schemes.description: Gateway bearer token for internal trusted peers.
OAuth/OIDC for user-linked or federated callers.
API key for fixed infrastructure peers.

skills.name: Agent Dispatch
skills.description: Non-blocking supervised task dispatch to approved internal agents.
examples: dispatch a task to the planner agent
send work to the geodesy agent

skills.name: Agent Handoff
skills.description: Delegation to approved agents through governed handoff workflows.

skills.name: Status Query
skills.description: Read-only task and run status retrieval.
